meaning: n.手掌,棕榈,(象征胜利的)棕榈叶vt.与...握手,藏...于掌中,蒙混
examples: He muted the strings with his palm.
Palm trees stir in the soft Pacific breeze.
He smacked a fist into the palm of his hand.
The Palm House is not the only festival venue with an unusual architectural history.
Alternatively, check into the Jumeirah Zabeel Saray on the West Crescent of the Palm Jumeirah.
